memoryArtifacts.headline: Osberne Giffard or Gyffarde
memoryArtifacts.description:
"After 1066 William the Conqueror gave the manor to Osbern Giffard, one of his generals."

One thing that everyone seems to agree on is that Osberne Giffard came from the town of Longueville le Giffar …

memoryArtifacts.headline: Info from Wikitree
memoryArtifacts.description:
Thoughts Regarding Osbert's Wife
According to the early writings of Robert de Torigny, one of Gunnora's sisters married Osbern de Bolebec, another married an unidentified forester of St. Vaast d'Equiq …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Osbert De Boldebec Lord of Longueville-le-Giffard於0970年出生在法國巴-諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯隆維爾時，他的父親Geoffrey De Bolebec45歲，母親Beatrice De Arques40歲。他於大約0985年與Aveline在法國豪-諾門迪帕斯 德 考結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1040年在法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利波爾貝享年70歲，埋葬在法國豪-諾門迪帕斯 德 考。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Osbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ōs ‘god’ + beorht ‘bright, famous’. It is not now common, but in the earlier 20th century it enjoyed a modest vogue in Britain, being borne for example by the cartoonist Osbert Lancaster ( 1908–86 ) and the writer Osbert Sitwell ( 1892–1969 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Osbert De Boldebec Lord of Longueville-le-Giffard was born in 0970, in Longueville, Calvados, Lower Normandy, France, his father, Geoffrey De Bolebec, was 45 and his mother, Beatrice De Arques, was 40. He married Aveline about 0985, in Pays de Caux, Upper Normandy, France. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died in 1040, in Bolbec, Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy, France, at the age of 70, and was buried in Pays de Caux, Upper Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Osbert De Boldebec Lord of Longueville-le-Giffard est né en 0970, à Longueville, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, France, son père, Geoffrey De Bolebec, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Beatrice De Arques, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Aveline environ 0985, à Pays de Caux, Haute-Normandie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé en 1040, à Bolbec, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, France, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Pays de Caux, Haute-Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Osbert De Boldebec Lord of Longueville-le-Giffard 0970 in Longueville, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Geoffrey De Bolebec 45 und seine Mutter Beatrice De Arques 40. Er hat um 0985 in Pays de Caux, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich Aveline geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb 1040 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Bolbec, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich und wurde in Pays de Caux, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Osbert De Boldebec Lord of Longueville-le-Giffard è nato il nel 0970 nel Longueville, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Geoffrey De Bolebec, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Beatrice De Arques, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Aveline circa 0985, nel Pays de Caux, Haute-Normandie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì nel 1040, nel Bolbec, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a Pays de Caux, Haute-Normandie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Osbert De Boldebec Lord of Longueville-le-Giffardが0970年にフランスバセ-ノーマンディカルヴァドスロングエヴィルで生まれた時，父Geoffrey De Bolebecは45歳，母Beatrice De Arquesは40歳であった。約0985年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディペイズ ド カウックスでAvelineと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1040年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメボルベックで70歳で死去し，フランスハウテ-ノーマンディペイズ ド カウックスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Osbert De Boldebec Lord of Longueville-le-Giffard(이)가 0970년 프랑스 배세-노먼디 캘바도스 론구에빌에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Geoffrey De Bolebec(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Beatrice De Arques(은)는 40세였다. 그는 대략 0985년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 파이스 데 카스에서 Aveline(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1040년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 세이인-마이팀 볼베크에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 하테-노먼디 파이스 데 카스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Osbert De Boldebec Lord of Longueville-le-Giffard nasceu em 0970, em Longueville, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, França, seu pai, Geoffrey De Bolebec, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Beatrice De Arques, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Aveline aproximadamente 0985, em Pays de Caux, Haute-Normandie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1040, em Bolbec, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, França, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Pays de Caux, Haute-Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Osbert De Boldebec Lord of Longueville-le-Giffard родился в 0970 г. в местности лонгуевилл, калвадос, бассе-норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Geoffrey De Bolebec было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrice De Arques, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Aveline около 0985 г. в местности пеис де каукс, хауте-норманди, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер в 1040 г. в местности болбек, сине-маритим, хауте-норманди, Франция в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности пеис де каукс, хауте-норманди, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Osbert De Boldebec Lord of Longueville-le-Giffard nació en 0970, en Longueville, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Francia, su papá, Geoffrey De Bolebec, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Beatrice De Arques, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Aveline aproximadamente 0985, en Pays de Caux, Haute-Normandie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió en 1040, en Bolbec, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Pays de Caux, Haute-Normandie, Francia.
